Translation.Description: Virtuosity is fundamental to lead an aerial orchestra but with this wand, the neophyte can become the maestro, harmonizing gales and hurricanes into a howling symphony.
Translation.Provides: Summon Aerial Ally - Allows the wielder to summon a winged ally in battle
Gust of Wind- A gust of wind blows 3 adjacent enemies next to the caster back a tile and, unless they resist, knocks them prone
